title: Contempt of commission
doc_html:
§1186.  Contempt of commission

The commission may fine and imprison in the parish where the commission may be in session at the time, any witness or other person adjudged to be in contempt of the authority of the commission, the same as in cases of contempt before the district courts of Louisiana.
doc_text:
§1186.  Contempt of commission
The commission may fine and imprison in the parish where the commission may be in session at the time, any witness or other person adjudged to be in contempt of the authority of the commission, the same as in cases of contempt before the district courts of Louisiana.
